codeReview.summary: This is a TESTING-ONLY task. No code changes were made by the worker. The worker successfully tested all 6 modules (COA, Aspek Kerja, Blok, Kas, Bank, Gudang) end-to-end via CDP/Electron and documented findings. All 6 form pages have proper resetForm() and onCancel() implementations for the Batal button, which suggests the failed Batal test in the handoff may be due to build/dist inconsistency rather than code defect.

issues.description: Batal button onClick correctly calls resetForm() and onCancel(). No code defect found - implementation matches the AGENTS.md convention 'onClick={() => { resetForm(); onCancel(); }}'. The worker reported this as FAIL during testing, which suggests either build was outdated or test environment issue.
Batal button onClick correctly calls resetForm() and onCancel(). No code defect found.

Kembali button fix (b85e701) correctly changed !== undefined to != null for all 6 module cases. This was the actual change in commit b85e701, not the test-all-modules feature.
Sidebar collapse state not persisting (VAL-CROSS-002) - worker correctly identified this as a bug. A subsequent feature (fix-sidebar-collapse-persistence) addressed this.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Frontend worker skill procedure for testing mentions CDP connection but doesn't specify how to verify the app is running. Worker spent time troubleshooting Electron startup issues before connecting.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker attempted multiple ways to start Electron with --remote-debugging-port=9222, including direct node_modules path. The services.yaml does have electron.start defined as 'npx electron . --remote-debugging-port=9222', but the skill doesn't reference services.yaml.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md documents Batal Button Fix Pattern but the testing task found Batal buttons still broken. This suggests either: (1) fix wasn't built/deployed before testing, or (2) the pattern documented in AGENTS.md doesn't match what was actually implemented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md states 'onClick={() => { resetForm(); onCancel(); }}' which IS what the code has. Code review confirms correct implementation exists in all 6 forms. The handoff reports testing on built dist/ not src/, suggesting build inconsistency.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered that the built Electron app needs to be running before CDP connection. This wasn't explicitly documented in the skill.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows netstat checks for port 9222 before attempting browser connection.

summary: Feature test-all-modules completed successfully as a testing-only task. Worker used agent-browser to test all 6 modules (COA, Aspek Kerja, Blok, Kas, Bank, Gudang) via CDP. Navigation, Add, Save, Kembali, and cross-module navigation work correctly. Batal button fails in testing but code review shows correct implementation exists in source - likely build/dist inconsistency. Sidebar collapse persistence issue was correctly identified and documented for subsequent fix. Skill procedure was followed correctly. No code changes were needed from this task.
